status: PRODUCTION READY - Offline Maps Support (P2 Feature) Complete
summary: Ralph Iteration 9 - Offline Maps Support (P2 Feature): Implemented comprehensive offline support for Taiwan families in areas with poor connectivity. Added IndexedDB-based location data persistence (24-hour TTL), service worker for OSM map tile caching (7-day TTL, 500 tile limit) and API response caching, PWA manifest.json for app installability, offline/online status detection with bilingual banner UI, and 4 new offline DB unit tests. All P2 features are now 100% complete: real-time crowdedness, events integration, and offline maps. All 177 tests passing (160 client + 17 server), 100% pass rate. Zero TypeScript errors. Production build successful (32.51 kB gzipped).

improvements_made.details: Added three-layer offline system: (1) service worker for OSM tile and API response caching, (2) IndexedDB for persistent location data storage with 24-hour TTL, (3) offline/online status detection with user-facing bilingual banner
improvements_made.impact: Taiwan families can now browse previously loaded locations and map tiles even without internet connectivity — critical for areas with poor signal

improvements_made.details: Added manifest.json with proper metadata, theme color, icons, and standalone display mode. Added apple-mobile-web-app meta tags for iOS compatibility.
improvements_made.impact: Users can now install FamMap as a native-like app on their home screen

improvements_made.details: Created offlineDb.test.ts with 4 tests covering saveLocations, loadLocations, clearOfflineDb, and isOfflineCacheAvailable

offline_architecture.service_worker: client/public/sw.js — CacheFirst for OSM tiles, NetworkFirst for API
offline_architecture.api_cache: famap-api-v1 — NetworkFirst with fallback to cached responses
offline_architecture.indexeddb: famap-offline v1 — locations store + meta store, 24-hour TTL
offline_architecture.pwa_manifest: client/public/manifest.json — standalone display, themed for FamMap
offline_architecture.offline_detection: navigator.onLine + window events — bilingual banner UI

boss_feedback_resolution.response: Completed all P2 features including offline maps support — Taiwan families can now use FamMap even without internet connectivity. Implemented PWA installability, service worker tile caching, IndexedDB data persistence, and bilingual offline status indicator.
boss_feedback_resolution.outcome: FamMap is now 100% feature complete (all P0, P1, P2 features), production-ready, PWA-installable, and works offline

iteration_notes: Iteration 9 completed all P2 features by implementing offline maps support. The implementation uses a careful approach: manual service worker registration (avoiding the previous vite-plugin-pwa crash), IndexedDB for data persistence, and progressive enhancement so the app continues to work without service worker support. All existing tests pass, 4 new tests added. Build succeeds with 0 TypeScript errors.
